LamBox.Empty:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Empty
    type variables:  []
      constructors:

Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Nat
    type variables:  []
      constructors:
        zero (0 arg(s))
        suc (1 arg(s))
          n : Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}

Newtype.Newtype:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Newtype
    type variables:  [A]
      constructors:
        mk (1 arg(s))
          _ : @0

Newtype.k:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: [A]
    type: □ → Newtype.Newtype{0} @0 → Newtype.Newtype{0} @0 → @0
    body: λ _ _ _ → case<Newtype.Newtype{0},0> @1 of λ<[_]> @0

Newtype.test:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: []
    type: Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}
    body: Newtype.k □
            (Newtype.Newtype{0}{0}
               (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                  (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                     (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                        (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                           (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                              (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                 (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                    (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                       (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                          (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                             (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}

                                                   (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}

            □
